---
title: "Particle Physics Course"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .quarto-title-block {
    display: none;
  }
</style>

<div class="course-index course-subpage">
  <a class="course-back-link" href="../index.html">← Particle Physics section</a>

  <section class="course-intro">
    <p class="course-kicker">Course scaffold</p>
    <h1>Particle Physics</h1>
    <p>
      Placeholder for the future 16-lecture course. The repository structure
      is ready for Russian and English slides and book materials.
    </p>
  </section>

  <section class="course-accordion" aria-label="Course scaffold">
    <details class="course-row" open>
      <summary>
        <span class="course-row-kind">RU</span>
        <span>Russian materials</span>
      </summary>
      <div class="course-row-body">
        <div class="course-links">
          <a href="ru/slides/">Slides</a>
          <a href="ru/book/">Book</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </details>

    <details class="course-row">
      <summary>
        <span class="course-row-kind">EN</span>
        <span>English materials</span>
      </summary>
      <div class="course-row-body">
        <div class="course-links">
          <a href="en/slides/">Slides</a>
          <a href="en/book/">Book</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </details>
  </section>
</div>
```
